description: Product Description Compatible Numatic Henry accessory tool set High quality kit which comes with all the accessories required when cleaning Comes with 1.8m hose 2 x chrome extension rods 1 x chrome bent end handle with suction control 1.8 metre long hose 1 x round dusting brush 1 x tool adaptor 1 x crevice tool 1 x litter picker/stair tool with slide off brush 1 x large floor tool with retractable brushes for carpet and hard wood floors Fits the following models - Numatic, Henry, James, George, Hetty, Basil, Edward & Rucksack Please note this part is a non genuine compatible spare part and the manufacturers' names and part numbers have been used for reference purposes only Box Contains 2 x chrome extension rods 1 x chrome bent end handle 2.5 metre long hose 1 x round dusting brush 1 x tool adaptor 1 x crevice tool 1 x stair tool 1 x large floor tool
